title: Exotic Crispy Peruvian Peppers Rocoto Relleno
description: A herbal and crispy solo dinner dish featuring Dutch stroop and shio koji cure, served in a tagliere vessel, this Peruvian recipe is a unique twist on traditional rocoto relleno.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut off the tops of the rocoto peppers and remove the seeds and membranes.
In a bowl, mix together the Dutch stroop, shio koji, garlic, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
Stuff each pepper with the stroop mixture and top with gluten-free breadcrumbs.
Drizzle the olive oil over the peppers and breadcrumbs.
Place the peppers in a tagliere vessel and bake for 25 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the peppers are crispy.
Remove the peppers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
